data.title: Congressman French Hill to take Binance’s Tigran Gambaryan as guest to the State of the Union
data.description:
Fox Business reporter has revealed that Congressman French Hill will be taking Binance executive Tigran Gambaryan as his guest to the State of the Union on March 4. Hill campaigned to get the exchange’s executive released from a Nigerian prison where he spent eight months on wrongful charges of tax evasion and money laundering.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hill-take-binances-tigran-gambaryan-as-guest/

data.title: Trump company files trademarks for branded metaverse, NFT marketplace
data.description:
DTTM Operations, a Trump-owned company, has filed trademark applications for the word “TRUMP” in connection with a metaverse and NFT marketplace.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-company-files-trademarks-branded-metaverse-nft-marketplace?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin CME Gap Is Still Open, Why $78,000 – $80,700 Are Very Important
data.description:
A new Bitcoin Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) gap has just been opened around $78,000 and $80,700. Analysts warn that this price range could act as a magnet for further downturns in the Bitcoin price, making it a critical area to watch in the coming days. According to crypto analyst Rekt Capital on X (formerly Twitter), Bitcoin is currently facing increased volatility as it moves closer to...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-cme-gap-open/

data.title: All about Ethereum’s yearly low – Is a drop below $2,000 next?
data.description:
Ethereum has been seeing strong bearish pressure, with whales turning to buy the dip.

data.title: Ex-Congressman McHenry Joins Ondo as Advisor
data.description:
Patrick McHenry, ex-Congressman and crypto advocate, has taken on a senior advisory role at Ondo Finance.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/ex-congressman-mchenry-joins-ondo-as-advisor

data.title: BTC on Track for 2nd Worst Feburary
data.description:
Bitcoin lost 21% this February, its worst performance since the Mt. Gox exchange collapse.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/btc-on-track-for-2nd-worst-feburary

data.title: Employee testimony hints at potential CFPB 1700 layoffs by Trump’s administration and Musk’s DOGE
data.description:
Federal employees from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) have raised concerns that the bureau’s Trump-appointed leadership and Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) intend to execute massive layoffs.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cfpb-1700-layoffs-by-musks-doge/

data.title: SEC Likens Memecoins to Collectibles With ‘No Use’, Declares Meme Assets Are Not Securities
data.description:
The top US securities regulator is officially announcing that memecoins do not fall under its purview, comparing the burgeoning crypto sector to “non-functional” collector’s items. In a new statement, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is declaring that memecoins are officially not securities. As defined by the SEC’s statement, “A ‘meme coin’ is a […]
The post SEC Likens...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/28/sec-likens-memecoins-to-collectibles-with-no-use-declares-meme-assets-are-not-securities/

data.title: Are L2s Still Worth Launching? The L1 vs. L2 Showdown
data.description:
As the L2 landscape cools and Ethereum’s performance lags, Layer 1 chains beckon with full design freedom, direct fee capture, and new growth potential.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/are-l2s-still-worth-launching-the-l1-vs-l2-showdown

data.title: Illicit Crypto Addresses Received $40,900,000,000 Worth of Digital Assets Last Year: Chainalysis
data.description:
Illicit crypto addresses pocketed a staggering $40.9 billion worth of digital assets last year, and that number is likely to balloon even further, per a new report from the blockchain data firm Chainalysis. Chainalysis notes in its annual Crypto Crime Report that 2024’s total is currently less than the $46.1 billion worth of crypto that […]

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/28/illicit-crypto-addresses-received-40900000000-worth-of-digital-assets-last-year-chainalysis/
